headline: Analyst Raises Vistra (VST) Price Target by $4
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is included among the 15 Best Nuclear Power Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the largest competitive power generators in the United States. The company operates a power generation fleet of natural gas, nuclear, coal, solar, and battery energy storage facilities in the country. […]
